S.FORM: Nelson Bobb sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA. kawas tay 1924 , ryax sa tay 25 nqu tay 2, Nelson Bobb, squliq na p'unro. (mhuqil sa kawas tay 2003) cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players

(mƒßuqil s~…ïa kawas~…ï taj ****) ¶~ ®inkƒßulan s~…ïa knita î s~…ïa Œ≤rŒ≤iru î lis~…ïts~…ï o* national Œ≤as~…ïketŒ≤all as~…ïs~…ïo ¶~ ®iation plajers~…ï
